name: Baked Crab Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Combine the butter and oil; set aside. Saute' onions, peppers, and garlic in a small amount of the reserved butter mixture in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until tender. Remove from heat. Gently stir in crabmeat and the next three ingredients.
Place tortillas on baking sheets; brush one side of each tortilla and sprinkle with cheese. Fold in half.
Bake at 475 degrees F. for 4 minutes or until golden. Cut each tortilla into thirds. Serve warm.
